attributes.action: Change the age in which a car becomes a classic and therefore VED and MOT exempt
attributes.additional_details: 40 years is far too long. Through purchase and 30 years of running, the country has had far more than the value of the car in tax.
attributes.background:
I would like the government to bring down the age at which a car becomes a classic, from 40 years to 30. 
Making younger cars also VED and MOT exempt.

rejection.details:
We appear already to have a petition open on this which you may wish to sign instead:

Reduce age required for historic/classic vehicle status from 40 to 30 years
https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/756228
